name: hs-idv-attendee
description: Health Summit 2026 attendee IDV (demo open). Any DOB accepted; booking reference optional and may be empty. Provide DOB and/or booking reference.

dob.description: Date of birth (dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd). Any value accepted in demo; used alone when booking reference is empty.

bookingReference.description: Optional. HS-BK-… booking reference; may be omitted or empty — DOB alone is enough.
